title: Qualifier (GSM v1)
description: Structural/property definition atom — the DPQ terminal that defines a specific property value within the bounds set by a Policy. Qualifier IS the atomic, declarative structural set point; its value is the single source of truth for structural property definitions.

name.description: Human-readable semantic identifier for the property group (e.g., 'database-infrastructure', 'retry-config', 'channel-resilience').

schema.description: Schema defining the property vocabulary — what property names exist and their types.

value.description: JSON string conforming to the schema. The structural set point — the specific property values this Qualifier defines.

satisfiedPolicies.description: Derived from Operationalization chains: SELECT DISTINCT o.policy FROM operationalization o WHERE o.qualifier = THIS AND o.policy IS NOT NULL.
